# Raising Kaelle
> Honest stories from raising a trilingual child in London — the activities, the challenges, and everything nobody tells you about parenting without a village.

## About
Raising Kaelle is a parenting blog written by a French-Peruvian family raising their daughter Kaelle in London. Kaelle is 3 years old, grows up speaking English, Spanish, and French, and has more energy than most adults know what to do with. This blog covers the 3–5 year age range and focuses on activities, camps, language development, social skills, and the honest reality of parenting in London without the family support network that comes naturally in Latin America or France.

## Key Topics
- Summer camps and holiday activities for toddlers aged 3–5 in London
- Raising a trilingual child (English, Spanish, French) in the UK
- Kids activities in London: ballet, tennis, gymnastics, drama
- Parenting without a village: the challenges of raising a child in London as an expat family
- Potty training, sleep, weaning, and developmental milestones
- Books for trilingual children and pre-birth reading lists
- Dental health for toddlers (including broken milk teeth)
- Affiliate-reviewed products genuinely used by the family

## Blog Posts

### Best Summer Camps in London for Kids Aged 3–4 (2025–2026 Guide)
URL: https://raisingkaelle.com/blog/summer-camps-london-toddlers-3-4
Summary: A first-hand guide to the best holiday camps and activity programmes in London for toddlers aged 3–4, including Kensington Ballet School, Dakodas Performing Arts, Teddy Tennis Holland Park, NWG Gymnastics, Kalmer Kids, and Dukes Meadows Golf in Chiswick. Written by a French-Peruvian family raising a trilingual daughter in London. Includes a comparison table, age guidance, booking tips, and affiliate-reviewed products Kaelle actually uses.

## Products Reviewed
- Roarsome Sparkle the Unicorn Tennis Kit (£35) — used at Teddy Tennis Holland Park
- Bloch Desdemona Tutu from Trotters (£34) — worn at Kensington Ballet School
- Decathlon Girls Velvet Dance Bag 15L Pink (£12.99) — used for ballet and dance classes

## About the Family
- **Kaelle** — 3 years old, born in London, trilingual (English, Spanish, French), loves ballet, tennis, gymnastics, books, and puzzles
- **Maman** — Peruvian, raised in Lima, moved to London
- **Papa** — French, from Paris, moved to London
- **Language policy** — Papa speaks French, Maman speaks Spanish, English at school and with friends
